item.title: Caker 0.0.1
item.description:
Caker 0.0.1

New version of Caker with improvements and bug fixes.

## 2026-04-19 (Git log summary - HEAD)

  • Localize installer package resources for English and French
  • Update log level localization to list available levels
  • Rollback commit
  • Potential fix for pull request finding
  • Potential fix for pull request finding
  • Potential fix for pull request finding
  • Fix post-installation package scripts and service installation
  • Adds recoveryMode param to VM start calls in tests
  • Use waitIPTimeout parameter in startVirtualMachine
  • Update Resources/Localizable.xcstrings
  • Update Sources/cakedlib/Handlers/StartHandler.swift
  • Update Sources/cakedlib/Handlers/LaunchHandler.swift
  • Simplifies event dispatch logic and improves debug logging
  • Add support for MacOS VM recovery mode
  • Initiates VNC connection before VM start
  • Refactors VNC view handling for external VM startup
  • Removes unused VM networking entitlement
  • Updates debug configs to use .bundle plugin paths
  • Improves error logging for connection reset cases
  • Improves release build setup and environment loading
  • Provide default language code if nil
  • Update Scripts/build-signed-release.sh
  • Update Scripts/build.inc.sh
  • Update Scripts/build-signed-debug.sh
  • Updates argument parser dependency and localizations
  • Updates argument parser dependency and French localizations
  • Updates argument parser dependency revision
  • Update dependencies to latest revisions
  • Update Swift package source and remove entitlements
  • Updates argument parser dependency and localizations
  • Ensures dynamic UI strings are correctly localized in settings views
  • Adds French translations for new UI strings and refines existing ones
  • Localizes UI strings for file selection and settings
  • Updates localizations and adjusts UI layout dimensions for better text fit
  • Adds and updates French and English localizations
  • Removes non-breaking spaces from French translations
  • Unifies output format flag handling and argument positioning
  • Ignores the traductions directory
  • Updates and expands localizable strings
  • Standardizes casing and punctuation in localized strings
  • Populates Localizable.xcstrings with French translations
  • Updates French localization strings
  • Moves newline characters out of localization strings
  • Updates French translation state in InfoPlist.xcstrings
  • Ignore tmp directory in version control
  • Replaces inline help strings with localized keys
  • Removes unused localization resource file
  • Adds InfoPlist.xcstrings for localized Info.plist strings
  • Updates localization resource compilation paths
  • Updates French localization strings
  • Refines French localization and adds CLI help strings
  • Migrates and organizes localization resources
  • Localizes command-line interface and error messages
  • Removes localization export artifacts
  • Updates French localization and relocates Localizable.xcstrings
  • Adds Identifiable conformance to Architecture
  • Unifies empty string handling and error messages
  • Implements localization support for English and French
  • Remove error handling from entitlement method
  • Resets the localization string catalog
  • Add Security import to Entitlement.swift
  • Potential fix for pull request finding
  • Uses Security framework for entitlement verification
  • 🌐 Update Sparkle appcast - 1 releases (2026-04-10 16:00:12)
